settings.title: Settings
settings.autoUploadOnDesc: New photos will be backed up automatically
settings.autoUploadNote: Background uploads depend on iOS/Android policies. For best results: keep the app open occasionally, connect to WiFi, and charge your device.
settings.englishDefaultNote: English is the default if your system language is not supported.
settings.deleteAccountWarning: This will permanently delete your account and all data. This action cannot be undone.
settings.fullEncryptionDesc: When enabled, files are encrypted before upload. Server cannot read your data. When disabled, files upload 2-5x faster but without encryption.

subscription.autoRenewNote: Subscription auto-renews monthly. Cancel anytime in Settings.

nftMint.stripsPrivateData: Strips date, location, device info from photo
nftMint.infoIpfs: Your photo will be stored on decentralized storage and certified for authenticity.
nftMint.infoStealthCloud: Your photo will be stored on encrypted cloud and certified for authenticity.
nftMint.compressedInfo: Private records are 99% cheaper. Your records are private.
nftMint.standardInfo: Standard records create a unique identifier per certification.
nftMint.onChainDesc: Photo is converted to vector art and embedded in the authenticity record.
nftMint.launchSpecialBanner: Launch Special - {{days}} Days Left! Up to 90% off!
nftMint.copyrightCertificate: Original stays on device, proof of ownership
nftMint.limitedEditionInfo: Original stays on your device. Only a thumbnail and certificate go on record.
nftMint.viewInGalleryOnChain: Your photo is embedded in the authenticity record. View in collection.
nftMint.licenseArrDesc: Full copyright protection. No reuse without explicit permission from the rights holder.
nftMint.licenseCcByDesc: Others may distribute, remix, adapt, and build upon the work, even commercially, as long as credit is given.
nftMint.licenseCcBySaDesc: Others may remix, adapt, and build upon the work, even commercially, but must credit and license derivatives under identical terms.
nftMint.licenseCcByNcDesc: Others may remix, adapt, and build upon the work for non-commercial purposes only, with credit to the creator.
nftMint.licenseCcByNcSaDesc: Others may remix, adapt, and build upon the work for non-commercial purposes only, with credit, and must license derivatives under identical terms.
nftMint.licenseCcByNdDesc: Others may copy and distribute the work in unadapted form only, even commercially, with credit to the creator.
nftMint.licenseCcByNcNdDesc: Others may copy and distribute the work in unadapted form only, for non-commercial purposes only, with credit to the creator.
nftMint.licenseCc0Desc: The creator waives all copyright and related rights. The work is dedicated to the public domain worldwide.
nftMint.licenseCommercialDesc: Custom commercial licensing terms. Contact the rights holder for specific usage permissions and fees.
nftMint.certificationModeDesc: Create a tamper-proof certification. Choose your privacy level.
nftMint.privateCertifiedDesc: Encrypted on your device before upload. Only you can decrypt and view the original. Public sees only the proof, not the image.
nftMint.publicCertifiedDesc: Unencrypted, publicly viewable. Stored on decentralized infrastructure. Ideal for portfolios, social profiles, or selling prints.
nftMint.insufficientBalance: Insufficient balance. Add credit in the Info tab.
nftMint.removePrivateDataDesc: Strip location, camera info and other private EXIF data before certification

certificates.title: Proof Records
certificates.noCertsHint: Certify an original to receive a proof record
certificates.deleteConfirm:
Remove certificate for "{{name}}"?
This only removes it locally — it will sync back from the server on next refresh.
certificates.exifHashVerify: EXIF Hash — SHA-256 of normalized EXIF fields (decimals rounded to 4dp, GPS truncated to 4dp). Verify with:
certificates.rfc3161Expected: Run all 3 commands in the same folder. Tap any command to copy it.
certificates.tokenHidden: (token hidden — tap Show to preview, tap row to copy)
certificates.archiveConfirm:
Archive proof record for "{{name}}"?
This removes it from your local view only. The permanent record remains and will sync back on next refresh.
certificates.tokenOnChain: Full token stored on-chain — verified via metadata

nftWelcome.title: Certify Your Originals
nftWelcome.subtitle: Create an authenticity record for any photo. The original stays safe.
nftWelcome.publicName: Share, sell or use as avatar
nftWelcome.publicDesc: Open Edition + Decentralized Storage + Unencrypted. Your photo is uploaded to permanent decentralized storage. Metadata is recorded for verification. Anyone can view the image. Ideal for portfolios, social profiles, or selling prints.
nftWelcome.publicPro1: Viewable in any compatible viewer or browser
nftWelcome.publicPro2: Original quality — no compression, no re-encoding
nftWelcome.publicPro3: Optional watermark to protect your work
nftWelcome.publicCon1: Image is publicly accessible via IPFS gateway
nftWelcome.publicCon2: EXIF (location, camera) visible unless you strip it
nftWelcome.privateDesc: Open Edition + Decentralized Storage + Encrypted. Same as above, but the image is encrypted on your device before upload. The file in storage is unreadable without your key. Ownership recorded, image stays private.
nftWelcome.privatePro2: Decryption key sealed to your wallet — the app never touches your private key, only requests a signature
nftWelcome.privatePro4: Stored on decentralised IPFS — no company can delete it
nftWelcome.privateCon1: Others see an encrypted blob, not the image
nftWelcome.privateCon2: Cannot be used as a public avatar or sold as-is
nftWelcome.certDesc: Limited Edition + Embedded + Encrypted. Your original photo and metadata are stored directly inside the authenticity record (not in separate storage — think of it as a permanent file attached to your proof). No external storage, no links that can break. Includes SHA-256 hashes of image + EXIF + camera serial, an RFC 3161 trusted timestamp (court-admissible), and a C2PA provenance manifest (Adobe/Microsoft standard).
nftWelcome.certPro1: No external dependencies — image is stored inside the record, not on a separate server
nftWelcome.certPro2: RFC 3161 timestamp from FreeTSA.org — accepted in legal proceedings
nftWelcome.certPro3: C2PA manifest — industry standard used by Adobe, Microsoft, BBC
nftWelcome.certPro4: Certificate of Authenticity — proves you took the photo, when, and with what camera
nftWelcome.certPro5: Permanent record — no cloud subscription, no link rot
nftWelcome.certCon1: Larger metadata — costs more than a simple IPFS upload
nftWelcome.certCon2: Not viewable as a regular image in wallets (encrypted data)
nftWelcome.factImageDesc: Your photo is never compressed or re-encoded. The record type refers to how the verification record is stored — your image stays pixel-perfect. All records have identical authenticity regardless of storage method.
nftWelcome.factExifDesc: Date, GPS, camera model, and serial number are preserved by default. You can strip EXIF before certifying for privacy. Limited Edition always hashes EXIF for proof without exposing it.
nftWelcome.factEncryptionDesc: Done on your device with AES-256-GCM before anything is uploaded. The decryption key is sealed to your wallet via a signature request — your private key never leaves the wallet. No server ever sees the original.
nftWelcome.factPublicDesc: Only unencrypted IPFS or unencrypted StealthCloud. Everything else — encrypted IPFS, encrypted embedded, or Limited Edition — keeps your image private.
